name: Nordicus Partners Corp
summary: Nordicus Partners Corporation is a U.S. publicly listed business accelerator and holding company focused on Nordic life sciences companies. It acquires and accelerates preclinical biotechnology firms targeting unmet medical needs. Its portfolio includes Orocidin A/S, developing QR-01 for aggressive periodontitis, and Bio-Convert A/S, developing QR-02 for oral leukoplakia treatment. The company also holds a 4.99% interest in Mag Mile Capital, a commercial real estate mortgage banking firm.
